title: filago prolifera
intro: Filago prolifera, also known as many-headed old man or common cudweed, is a perennial herb belonging to the family Asteraceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant's leaves and stems are rich in flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which contribute to its health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and supporting the immune system. Filago prolifera can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is also used in herbal creams and ointments to treat skin conditions and promote tissue repair.
